diff_collected.reason: The agent explicitly ran `git diff --stat && echo '---CACHED---' && git diff --cached --stat && echo '---STATUS---' && git status --short` to collect git diff and status information before reviewing.

verdict_reject.reason: The review header is '## Review: Request Changes', clearly indicating a rejection verdict rather than approval.

found_secret.reason: The agent flagged it as critical: '[critical] auth.ts:2 — хардкод секрета: const SECRET = "supersecret123". Учётные данные в исходном коде — грубая уязвимость безопасности (OWASP A02).'}

found_console_log.reason: The agent flagged it as critical: '[critical] auth.ts:5 — console.log("login attempt", email, password) выводит пароль в открытом виде в логи. Утечка учётных данных — критическая уязвимость.'

found_missing_validation.reason: The agent noted general missing input validation ('[warning] auth.ts:4 — нет валидации входных данных: пустые строки, null, не-строки пройдут в функцию без ошибки') but never specifically called out …

found_any_types.reason: The agent flagged it as critical: '[critical] auth.ts:4 — параметры email: any, password: any. Тип any отключает проверки типов. Требуется email: string, password: string.'

no_commit.reason: The git log shows no new commits by the agent. The final git status shows only untracked files (auth.ts) with 'nothing added to commit but untracked files present', confirming no commit was made.

severity_tags.reason: All findings are tagged with severity levels: '[critical]' and '[warning]' tags are consistently used throughout the report findings section.

verdict_first_line.reason: The report starts with '## Review: Request Changes' as the very first line, followed by '---', making the verdict immediately visible at the top of the report.

diff_first_references.reason: Every finding references a specific file and line number from the diff: auth.ts:2 (hardcoded secret), auth.ts:5 (console.log), auth.ts:7 (hardcoded token), auth.ts:4 (any types, return type, missing …
